name: Fire Fighter's Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Drippings (See Cooking Bouillon Granules Instructions)
16 oz canned kidney or pinto beans, drained and rinsed - salt and pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the sausage from its casing.
2. Brown the sausage and ground beef in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Remove and drain, reserving the measured amount of drippings specified in the ingredients list.
4. Return the drippings to the skillet.
5. Add the onion and garlic.
6. Cook for 3 minutes.
7. Return the meats to the skillet.
8. Stir in all the remaining ingredients except the salt and pepper.
9. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
10. Reduce heat to a simmer.
11. Cover.
12. Simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
13. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
14. Serve hot.
